text.title: OpenAI Embeddings — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for chunk → embed → upsert → search. Each step has typed input + bounded action + observable output.

step.name: pin-config
step.input: Pipeline tier (latency budget, cost ceiling, expected recall).
step.action: Choose `(model, dimensions)` and persist in a single `config.py` consumed by ingest and query. Default: `text-embedding-3-small`, dims=1536.
step.output: Frozen embedding config; startup smoke test passes.
step.decision-gate: If `vector_store.dims != config.dimensions` at startup → fail loud.

step.name: chunk
step.action: Apply semantic chunker with ~10% overlap. Reject chunks > 8000 tokens.
step.output: List of `(custom_id, chunk_text)` tuples ready for embedding.

step.name: embed
step.action: If > 1000 chunks and 24-hour window OK → Batch API. Else → sync `embeddings.create`. Pin `model` and `dimensions` from config.
step.output: List of embedding records matching the output contract.

step.name: upsert
step.action: Write to vector store keyed by `custom_id`; include `chunk_text` and `source_hash` payload for retrieval and dedup.

step.name: search
step.action: Expand short / ambiguous queries via LLM rewrite. Embed expanded query with same `(model, dimensions)`. Nearest-neighbor search top-k.
step.output: Ranked list of `(score, chunk_text, custom_id)` tuples.

step.name: return-results
step.action: Filter by score floor; deduplicate by `source_hash`; format for downstream consumer (RAG prompt assembly).
step.output: Filtered, deduplicated chunk list ready for context injection.
